page: Microsoft Azure E32ps_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Epsv6 server family. It is powered by a dedicated 32-core Microsoft Neoverse-N2 ARM64 processor operating at 3.4 GHz, with one thread per core. The server features 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data highlights exceptional memory performance, with uncached large-block read and write memory bandwidth reaching 436.06 GB/sec and 184.19 GB/sec respectively, placing both in the top tier. PassMark memory and database operations also rank in the top tier, with database operations scoring 37,163.36. Multi-core performance is strong, as evidenced by a stress-ng multi-core score of 66,283.59 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 19,664.0. Single-core tasks, such as gzip compression, perform strongly, while complex tasks like large-model LLM prompt processing show lower efficiency.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARM64 architecture delivers high resource density and memory throughput without the premium cost associated with traditional x86 memory-optimized hardware. The absence of bundled local storage allows users to scale external storage independently, optimizing resource allocation. This profile makes the E32ps_v6 highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E32ps_v6 is an ARM64-based virtual machine from the Epsv6 family, designed for memory-intensive workloads. It features a dedicated 32-core Microsoft Neoverse-N2 processor running at 3.4 GHz and 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it supports Premium Storage. The server exhibits top-tier memory performance, with uncached large-block read bandwidth of 436.06 GB/sec and write bandwidth of 184.19 GB/sec. PassMark database operations also rank in the top tier at 37,163.36. Multi-core CPU performance is strong, supported by a stress-ng multi-core score of 66,283.59. Qualitatively, the ARM64 architecture offers high memory density and throughput with favorable cost-to-performance characteristics. This server is highly suited for database operations, memory caching, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ps_v6 is an ARM64 virtual server featuring 32 dedicated Neoverse-N2 cores and 256 GB of RAM. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance for memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ps_v6 is an ARM64 server with 32 dedicated cores and 256 GB RAM, offering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.
tagline: An ARM64-powered virtual machine delivering high-density memory allocation and top-tier memory bandwidth for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-core Microsoft Neoverse-N2 ARM64 processor at 3.4 GHz
Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core
Top-tier memory bandwidth with 436.06 GB/sec large-block read speeds
Excellent database performance scoring 37,163.36 on PassMark database operations
Premium Storage capable with no bundled local storage or GPUs
Best suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, and web serving
